items.title: Modeling chat domain objects
items.description: Represent Message, Conversation and Usage as classes so roles, content and token totals are structured, validated and easy to serialize to API payloads.

items.title: A reusable client wrapper
items.description: Wrap provider configuration (model, API key, default params) in a Client class so every call shares consistent settings and the rest of the app depends on a small interface.

items.title: Pluggable tools for agents
items.description: Define each tool as a class exposing a common run() method; the agent discovers and invokes any tool by interface (duck typing) without knowing concrete types.

items.title: Computed properties
items.description: Expose derived values like total tokens or cost via @property so callers read them like attributes while the calculation stays encapsulated.

items.title: Extending base behavior with inheritance
items.description: A BaseTool/BaseAgent parent centralizes shared setup and contracts; subclasses use super() and override only what differs.
